pageContext.name: Akaza (Shake The Sword Burn Your Heart)
pageContext.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release, the Akaza (Shake The Sword Burn Your Heart) Statue!  This statue is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Akaza from Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba. Standing at approximately 3.7' tall, the demon Akaza is seen striking a powerful pose.  Demon Slayer fans, be sure to enhance your collection with the Akaza statue today!
